subtitle: Revenue, cost and margin across all relay sites — all real data
rangeInvalid: Start date cannot be after end date
trendNote: Daily revenue, cost, profit and requests are all real values (cost = that day's engine upstream account cost, or cost-rate override).
statPartial: Sites with a cost basis only
pricingHint: Some sites have no cost basis (engine reports no account cost and no rate is set) — cost and profit only sum the rest. You can set a cost rate for them.
revenueSource: Revenue = user spend (retail) · Cost = engine account cost — both real
sourceEngineHint: Real upstream account cost recorded by the engine (COGS)
ratioModalDesc: Cost defaults to each site's real upstream account cost from the engine — no setup needed. Only set a cost rate here if you want a fixed-ratio basis, or a site's engine reports no account cost (cost = revenue × rate). When set, that site uses this instead.
ratioClearHint: Leave blank and save to clear the override; the site returns to engine account cost.
ratioRange: Cost rate must be a percentage between 0 and 100
accountNote: The upstream-channel view is engine-limited to "last N days" (ending today) and does not follow the date range above. Admin only.
concentrationDesc: Top 3 customers' share of total revenue ({n} customers)
breakdownEmpty: No data for this dimension in the selected period
dailyNote: Per day: top-ups · consumption (revenue) · cost · profit · requests · tokens (top-ups = cash received, a different caliber from consumption; USD/RMB 1:1)
